name: Beszel-Hub
description: Beszel is a simple, lightweight server monitoring hub with a clean web UI. It supports real-time metrics for CPU, memory, disk, and network usage across all your systems, including Docker container monitoring.

paths.name: Beszel Data
paths.description: Persistent storage for Beszel Hub. Contains the database, configuration and all monitoring data.

ports.name: Web UI Port
ports.description: Web interface port for the Beszel Hub dashboard. Access via http://[YOUR-IP]:8090

variables.name: App URL
variables.description: The URL under which the Beszel Hub is reachable. Use your local server IP for local setups (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8090) or your domain for remote access.
